title: Living in Boulder Vlog 7 - 18 - 2017: Roman Roads

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update from Boulder, mentioning his old bike was deemed unrepairable and he purchased a new Merrix disc brake bike for $2000. He also discusses his ongoing project tracing Roman roads digitally, which he has been working on intensively over the past few days.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: not worth repairing, needed a replacement
excited about it and expects it to motivate more outdoor riding and fitness
committed to finishing it; copy-paste approach doesn't work well, prefers tracing from scratch
needs money badly; will seek sponsorship before getting a second job because he believes his website is strong enough to attract sponsors
